particulars.description: Freehold property known as 25-26 westcliff parade, westcliff-on-sea, SS0 7QE, being all of the land and buildings in title EX532336. Freehold property known as 25-26 westciff parade, westcliff-on-sea, SS0 7QE, being all of the land and buildings in title EX191398, including all buildings, fixtures and fittings, the related rights and the goodwill.
